description: A taxpayer is due a refund and wants it deposited directly into their checking account.

nodes.task_description: Finalize the tax return to confirm the refund amount.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the final refund value.

nodes.task_description: Collect the taxpayer's bank account information (routing and account number).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent securely collects the bank details.

nodes.task_description: Enter the direct deposit information into the tax return before filing.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly inputs the banking information into the designated fields on the return.
